title: Indulgent Grilled Greek Polish Sausage Souvlaki
description: Tender Polish sausage smothered in a grassy, herby Greek-inspired sauce, grilled to perfection in a Dutch oven. A flavorful and filling dinner perfect for a weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: Wood chips (such as beech or mesquite)

instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven to 400°F (200°C) with the wood chips inside.
Cut the Polish sausage into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine parsley, oregano, garlic, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, honey, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
Add the Greek yogurt to the blender and blend until well combined.
Thread the Polish sausage pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the Dutch oven with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Add the skewers to the Dutch oven and brush with the Greek sauce.
Close the lid and grill for 20-25 minutes, or until the sausage is cooked through and the sauce is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
